title: thelypteris extensa
intro: Thelypteris extensa, also known as the Narrow-leaved Cinnamon Fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the Thelypteridaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Thelypteris extensa include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. The plant is often prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions for its medicinal purposes, and its rhizome is sometimes used in traditional Chinese medicine.
